name: Transurban Group
description: Transurban Group is an Australia-based company that specializes in the development, operation, management, and maintenance of toll road networks. The company plays a critical role in urban infrastructure, managing 22 toll roads across major cities in Australia, the United States, and Canada, including Melbourne, Sydney, Brisbane, Greater Washington, and Montreal. Beyond road operations, Transurban focuses on integrating sustainable transport solutions, supporting local communities, and improving mobility to keep cities moving efficiently while reducing environmental impacts and enhancing the overall travel experience for motorists.
